featureName: BUG-020-006: Governance Baseline Drift (TDD markers, status format, required phases, change boundary, consumer/infra sweeps, code-diff evidence, deferral hits)

executionHistory.summary: bubbles.validate trigger probe in sweep-2026-05-24-r10 round 3 (parent-expanded child workflow mode reconcile-to-doc) identified 43 governance baseline finding hits across 16 finding classes against parent specs/020-security-hardening. Routed to validate-to-doc artifact-only bug packet because all 16 finding classes are artifact-integrity gaps with no runtime code surface.

Re-ran state-transition-guard on parent specs/020-security-hardening after artifact edits. F1 (status format), F2 (required phases), F3+F16 (provenance), F4..F11 (per-scope DoD additions + Consumer Impact + Shared Infrastructure + Change Boundary sections), F12 (weak evidence blocks strengthened), F13 (Code Diff Evidence section added), F14 (4 Gate G040 false-positives wrapped with skip sentinels), F15 (TDD Evidence section added) all closed. Final verdict: TRANSITION PERMITTED with 2 warning(s), zero BLOCKs.

Audit confirms only specs/020-security-hardening/ paths in staged diff. No production code, test code, config, CI/CD, or docs outside spec folder touched. PII redaction verified (no /home/<user>/... in evidence blocks). artifact-lint passes on both parent and bug packet; traceability-guard passes on parent with 18 scenarios mapped to DoD items.

Bug packet 6-artifact set created at specs/020-security-hardening/bugs/BUG-020-006-governance-baseline-drift/. Parent report.md updated with TDD Evidence section, Code Diff Evidence section, three strengthened evidence blocks, and five Gate G040 skip sentinel wraps. Parent scopes.md updated with file-level Change Boundary, Shared Planning Expectations, per-scope DoD additions, Consumer Impact Sweep (Scopes 2/3), Shared Infrastructure Impact Sweep (Scope 2). Parent state.json updated with extended phase claim arrays and 6 new provenance entries. No other docs touched.

Bug closed at validate-to-doc ceiling 'validated'. All 21 numbered DoD items satisfied with file:line evidence. Sweep ledger entry recorded round=3 spec=020-security-hardening trigger=validate mappedMode=reconcile-to-doc bugFinalStatus=validated findings=43 findingsClosedThisRound=43. Parent spec 020 returns to guard-clean state.

scopeProgress.name: Close All Sixteen Governance Baseline Findings
